refs.unrefOnly: app-sidecar.ts:1226 — watcher.unref() (keeps process exitable; handle stays open)
refs.debounce: app-sidecar.ts:1213,1217-1218 — watchDebounce cleared only on re-arm; no teardown clears it
refs.noClose: grep: zero matches for `watcher.close` in app-sidecar.ts
refs.noDispose: app-sidecar.ts:~1241 — createProgressManager returns { snapshot, awardRun }; no close/dispose

fsWatchLeak.verdict: The fs.watch handle is never closed and the debounce timer is never cleared on shutdown. unref() only stops the watcher from pinning the event loop; the FD stays open for the process lifetime. One manager per daemon today, but any re-creation (or per-session use) leaks a watcher + pending 150ms debounce timer each time.
